projectDescription: A free, open-source desktop application that safely and easily flashes OS images to SD cards and USB drives on Windows, macOS, and Linux.
keyFeatures: Safe flashing — prevents accidental writes to system drives
Write verification — validates every byte after flashing
Multi-drive flashing — write to multiple drives simultaneously
Wide format support — ISO, IMG, ZIP, GZ, XZ, DMG, and more
Cross-platform — runs on Windows, macOS, and Linux
Auto-decompression — flashes compressed images without manual extraction
Raspberry Pi USB boot support — direct flashing to Pi devices
Automatic updates — keeps the app current with latest releases
publicApiSurface: Flash OS image to SD card or USB drive
Select source image (local file, URL, or cloud)
Monitor flash progress with speed and ETA
View flash results (bytes written, success/failure per device)
Settings: errorReporting, updatesEnabled, desktopNotifications, autoBlockmapping, decompressFirst
Supported image formats: bin, bz2, dmg, dsk, etch, gz, hddimg, img, iso, raw, rpi-sdimg, sdcard, vhd, wic, xz, zip
